name: Pan Di Spagna - Basic Genoise (Sponge Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and egg yolks with a wire whisk attachment until the mixture doubles in volume, about 15 minutes on high speed.
2. Gradually add sugar to the beaten eggs, continuing to mix on low speed.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Sift together cake flour, cornstarch, and salt.
5. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the egg mixture until just combined.
6. Grease two 10-inch round cake pans with shortening.
7. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes, or until the tops are springy to the touch.
9. Remove cakes from the pans and cool on wire racks.
10. Slice off the tops of the cooled cakes using a long serrated knife.
11. Cut each cake into three uniform layers.
